version: 0.1.9 (Production-Hardened v0.4 Spec + Exact Airgap Env Fields)
description: Browser-native, zero-server, LLM-agnostic memory management library with full lifecycle, clustering, and contradiction resolution.
architecturalDecisions: Embeddings are EXCLUDED from public API responses via the MemoryDTO pattern to prevent IPC serialization overhead.
JSON Export serializes Float32Arrays to Base64 to survive JSON.stringify.
Web Worker instantiates via compiled artifacts or Vite worker hooks.
Model Loading defaults to 'Fetch Once, Cache Forever' (allowRemoteModels=true) for zero-config DX.
Strict airgapped loading is supported via the `localModelBaseUrl` configuration escape hatch, explicitly mapping to `env.localModelPath`.
ONNX WASM pathing is strictly typed and normalized internally, and Transformers.js version is pinned.

tasks.title: Project Scaffold & Core Types
tasks.description: Set up the TypeScript project, build tooling, and define all core TS interfaces based on PRD v0.4 Schema.

subtasks.title: Initialize NPM package and Build Tooling
subtasks.description: Set up a tree-shakeable ESM package using Vite (Library Mode). Configure worker compilation strategies.
requirements: Must configure Vite to output the worker as a separate consumable asset.
aiInstructions: Strictly pin `@xenova/transformers` to an exact version (e.g., `2.16.1` or `3.0.0-alpha`) in package.json to prevent underlying ORT API drift.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: npm run build && find dist -name '*worker*.js' | grep .
definitionOfDone: Empty build runs successfully.
Worker is compiled to a distinct file chunk found via recursive search.

subtasks.title: Define Core TypeScript Interfaces (DTO Pattern)
subtasks.description: Translate the PRD's Schema into distinct internal and public types.
requirements: Define `LokulMemOptions` including `workerUrl?: string`, `onnxWasmBaseUrl?: string`, `onnxWasmPaths?: Record<string, string>`, `allowRemoteModels?: boolean` (default true), and `localModelBaseUrl?: string`.
Define `LokulMemExport` containing version, schemaVersion, modelName, and memories (with base64 embeddings).
aiInstructions: Implement utility types to easily convert Record -> DTO.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: import { MemoryRecord, MemoryDTO, LokulMemOptions } from './src/types'; const arr: Float32Array = new Float32Array(384);
definitionOfDone: DTO pattern ensures embeddings never accidentally cross IPC.
WASM pathing and local model airgap options are explicit.

tasks.title: Main Thread Initialization & Worker IPC
tasks.description: Implement the `init()` sequence, robust worker mode detection, and `MessageChannel` RPC setup.

subtasks.title: Worker Build & ONNX Asset Strategy (Globs)
subtasks.description: Configure the bundler to copy ALL ONNX helper assets into the dist folder using glob patterns.
requirements: Configure Vite build (via `vite-plugin-static-copy`) to copy `ort-wasm*.wasm` and `ort-wasm*.mjs` from `node_modules/onnxruntime-web/dist/` into `dist/`.
aiInstructions: Use glob patterns to catch SIMD, threaded, and standard builds automatically, plus their JS loader counterparts.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: npm run build && find dist -name 'ort-wasm*.mjs' | wc -l | grep -v 0
definitionOfDone: Multiple ONNX WASM and MJS files are physically present in the build output.

subtasks.title: Robust Worker Mode Detection & Safe Instantiation
subtasks.description: Implement `detectWorkerMode()` testing for ESM SharedWorker support.
requirements: If `options.workerUrl` provided, use it. Else import the worker using Vite's explicit `?worker` syntax or reference the compiled `.js` artifact.
Try/catch instantiation of module SharedWorker -> module Dedicated Worker -> main thread.
aiInstructions: Ensure the default instantiation path does not rely on resolving TypeScript files at runtime.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const mode = await detectWorkerMode(); console.assert(['shared', 'dedicated', 'main-thread'].includes(mode));
definitionOfDone: Worker instantiates correctly across environments from published distribution.

subtasks.title: MessageChannel RPC Dispatcher
subtasks.description: Establish a Promise-based RPC mechanism using `MessageChannel`.
requirements: Create a dispatcher mapping unique message IDs to Promises.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const result = await rpc.call('ping', { data: 'test' }); console.assert(result === 'pong');
definitionOfDone: Main thread can await a function executed in the worker.

subtasks.title: Dexie in Worker Initialization & Smoke Test
subtasks.description: Verify and initialize Dexie inside the chosen Worker context.
requirements: Initialize Dexie DB inside the worker.
Perform a basic readiness write/read to ensure IDB isn't blocked.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const ok = await rpc.call('initDB'); console.assert(ok === true);
definitionOfDone: Worker successfully interacts with IndexedDB.

subtasks.title: Dexie Schema Definition
subtasks.description: Define the v1 schema exactly as specified in the PRD.
requirements: Memories indexes: 'id, *types, status, clusterId, lastAccessedAt, baseStrength, validFrom, pinned, mentionCount, [status+lastAccessedAt], [status+pinned]'.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const db = new LokulMemDB(); await db.open(); console.assert(db.memories !== undefined);
definitionOfDone: Schema v1 successfully creates IndexedDB stores.

tasks.title: Embedding Engine & Vector Search (Worker Layer)
tasks.description: Implement Transformers.js pipeline, dual-mode loading strategies, concurrency queue, and brute-force search.

subtasks.title: Transformers.js Config, DX-First Loading, & Queue
subtasks.description: Load model defaulting to Fetch-Once-Cache-Forever, with strict airgap support.
requirements: **CRITICAL:** If `options.localModelBaseUrl` is provided, enable airgap mode: set `env.allowLocalModels = true`, `env.allowRemoteModels = false`, and strictly set `env.localModelPath = options.localModelBaseUrl`.
Normalize WASM paths: Set `env.backends.onnx.wasm.wasmPaths` to `options.onnxWasmPaths` or `options.onnxWasmBaseUrl`.
Implement a Promise-based concurrency queue (mutex) around `embed()`.
aiInstructions: Ensure the output is cast to `Float32Array` before caching. Handle the `env.localModelPath` explicit assignment so the agent does not hallucinate the property name.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const [v1, v2] = await Promise.all([embed('a'), embed('b')]); console.assert(v1 instanceof Float32Array);
definitionOfDone: Model loads seamlessly for default users via CDN/Cache.
Model loads successfully from a local origin when airgap options are configured.

subtasks.title: Brute-Force Vector Search Engine
subtasks.description: Implement optimized cosine similarity and in-memory search.
requirements: Implement highly optimized cosine similarity for Float32Array.
Load active embeddings into an in-memory array cache (`[{id, vec, meta}]`).
aiInstructions: Use a standard `for` loop for cosine similarity.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const results = index.search(vecQuery, 5); console.assert(results.length <= 5);
definitionOfDone: Returns ranked results in < 30ms.

subtasks.title: Specificity NER Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement Specificity regex rules.
requirements: Rules: Name (0.3), Place (0.25), Number (0.2), Preference (0.25), Date (0.2), Negation (0.2).
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const score = scoreSpecificity('I prefer dark mode'); console.assert(score >= 0.25);
definitionOfDone: Specificity returns correct semantic weights.

subtasks.title: Novelty (O(log N) Routing), Recurrence & E(s)
subtasks.description: Calculate final extraction score routing Novelty directly through the retrieval backend.
requirements: **CRITICAL:** Novelty(s) MUST be computed via `1 - top1_similarity` using `vectorIndex.search(embed(s), 1)`. Do NOT implement a separate similarity loop.
aiInstructions: Ensure `vectorIndex.search` is utilized for the novelty check to maintain performance scaling.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const eScore = await calculateE('My name is Alex', index); console.assert(eScore > 0.0);
definitionOfDone: Scoring avoids redundant O(N) loops.

subtasks.title: Temporal Marker & Conflict Logic
subtasks.description: Detect temporal markers or typed attribute conflicts.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const res = detectContradiction('I used to live in Berlin, now London', oldMem); console.assert(res.resolution === 'temporal-coexistence');
definitionOfDone: Logic correctly distinguishes temporal updates from conflicts.

subtasks.title: Decay, Pruning & Synchronous Clustering
subtasks.description: Implement Ebbinghaus decay, session sweep, and strictly synchronous K-means.
requirements: Sweep: Mark faded, remove from RAM cache.
aiInstructions: Do NOT use `requestIdleCallback` or asynchronous chunking for the clustering loop in v0.1. Implement it as a standard blocking `while` loop within the worker.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: await runMaintenanceSweep(db); await runClustering(db);
definitionOfDone: Faded memories removed.
Clusters persisted synchronously.

tasks.title: Retrieval Layer
tasks.description: Implement R(m, q) scoring and debugging.

subtasks.title: Composite Scoring & Debug Output
subtasks.description: Score memories and generate debug info.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const { debug } = await retrieve(query, { debug: true }); console.assert(debug.candidates.length > 0);
definitionOfDone: Scoring is accurate.
Budget is respected.

subtasks.title: Implement augment & learn
subtasks.description: Connect main thread methods to worker pipelines.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const res = await memory.augment('hi', [], { debug: true }); console.assert(res.debug !== undefined);
definitionOfDone: API methods functional.

tasks.title: Public API: manage() & IPC Optimization
tasks.description: Implement management API with efficient data transfer.

subtasks.title: Query Methods via MemoryDTO
subtasks.description: Implement list/get converting records to DTOs.
requirements: All results must be mapped to `MemoryDTO` (embedding removed) before crossing IPC.
Provide `includeEmbedding?: boolean` to optionally fetch standard memory records.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const items = await memory.manage().list(); if(items.length > 0) console.assert(items[0].embedding === undefined);
definitionOfDone: Manage API functional.
IPC payloads are lightweight by default.

subtasks.title: Mutations, Strict RAM Cache Sync, & Event DTOs
subtasks.description: Implement mutations that keep RAM cache in sync and broadcast DTO events.
requirements: **CRITICAL:** Ensure all mutations synchronously update the in-memory vector cache in the worker.
aiInstructions: Vector cache syncing is a primary vector for ghost data bugs. Handle index syncing inside the exact same transaction logic as the Dexie writes.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: await memory.manage().delete('id-1'); const results = await memory.manage().semanticSearch('the thing id-1 was about'); console.assert(results.every(r => r.id !== 'id-1'));
definitionOfDone: Mutations reflect instantly in search without requiring a reload.
Events do not lag the main thread.

subtasks.title: Export/Import Serialization
subtasks.description: Implement JSON export and import with Base64 arrays.
requirements: JSON export must convert `Float32Array` to Base64 strings.
JSON import must reconstruct `Float32Array` from Base64.
Include `version`, `schemaVersion`, `modelName`, and `embeddingDims` in the export root object.
aiInstructions: Search web for 'convert ArrayBuffer to base64 typescript' for an efficient, browser-native conversion.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: const json = await memory.manage().export(); console.assert(typeof json.memories[0].embedding === 'string');
definitionOfDone: Full round-trip capability via JSON stringification.

subtasks.title: Unit & Integration Tests
subtasks.description: Test math, logic, and worker flows.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: npm run test
definitionOfDone: Tests pass reliably.

subtasks.title: React Demo App (Isolated Workspace)
subtasks.description: Build an example app in complete isolation from library dependencies.
requirements: Initialize demo app in `examples/react-app/` with its own strictly isolated `package.json`.
Dependencies like React, Vite plugins, and UI libraries MUST NOT bleed into the root library `package.json`.
aiInstructions: Double check that the root `package.json` does not contain React after setting this up.
subtasks.acceptanceTestSnippet: cd examples/react-app && npm install && npm run dev
definitionOfDone: Demo runs.
Library package size remains unpolluted by UI framework dependencies.
